title: nasturtium indicum var. micranthum
intro: Nasturtium indicum var. micranthum, also known as Indian cress or dwarf nasturtium, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is native to the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, due to the presence of compounds such as isothiocyanates and glucosinolates. The health benefits of Nasturtium indicum var. micranthum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
